zh.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry FitzGerold於大約1140年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，他的父親Robert FitzGerold11138歲，母親Alice  Albereda Le Meschin52歲。他和matilda de chesney至少有2個兒子。他去世於大約1175年享年37歲。

zh-hans.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry FitzGerold于大约1140年出生在英国英格兰波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，他的父亲Robert FitzGerold11138岁，母亲Alice  Albereda Le Meschin52岁。他和matilda de chesney至少有2个儿子。他去世于大约1175年享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry FitzGerold was born about 1140, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzGerold, was 11138 and his mother, Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, was 52. He had at least 2 sons with matilda de chesney. He died about 1175, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry FitzGerold est né environ 1140, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzGerold, avait 11138 ans et sa mère, Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec matilda de chesney. Il est décédé environ 1175, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry FitzGerold um 1140 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzGerold 11138 und seine Mutter Alice  Albereda Le Meschin 52. Er hatte mit matilda de chesney mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb um 1175 im Alter von 37 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzGerold è nato il circa 1140 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzGerold, aveva 11138 anni e il suo madre, Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con matilda de chesney. Morì circa 1175, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry FitzGeroldが約1140年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Robert FitzGeroldは11138歳，母Alice  Albereda Le Meschinは52歳であった。彼はmatilda de chesneyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1175年に37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry FitzGerold(이)가 대략 1140년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzGerold(은)는 11138세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice  Albereda Le Meschin(은)는 52세였다. 그는 matilda de chesney(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1175년 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry FitzGerold nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzGerold, tinha 11138 anos e sua mãe, Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com matilda de chesney. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1175, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry FitzGerold родился около 1140 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzGerold было 11138 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, 52. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от matilda de chesney. Он умер около 1175 г. в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry FitzGerold nació aproximadamente 1140, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert FitzGerold, tenía 11138 años y su mamá, Alice  Albereda Le Meschin, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con matilda de chesney. Murió aproximadamente 1175, a la edad de 37 años.
